title: Senior Fleet Manager at Ashok Leyland

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Ashok Leyland
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ashok Leyland! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Nagpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ashok Leyland:
Ashok Leyland is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ashok Leyland!
